assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create or obtain access to an F5 Distributed Cloud SaaS account, complete Console onboarding preferences, and reach Home; resolve which service quickstart is first success beyond Console entry.

first_success.outcome: The developer reaches Console Home with workspace tiles after initial preferences, if Console onboarding is the selected terminal.
first_success.observable_signal: Console Home loads with Common Workspaces tiles.

route_selection.surface: F5 Distributed Cloud Console onboarding versus service-specific quickstarts
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Console signup and initial preference onboarding to Home
candidates.reason: Many service-specific quickstarts exist; Console Home may be too weak as first success versus deploying a named service.

candidates.name: Service-specific quickstart such as Secure Kubernetes Gateway or HTTP load balancer CDN
candidates.reason: Peer outcomes with different required actions; lexicographic winner not established.

required_path.action: Sign up for or access an F5 Distributed Cloud SaaS account.
required_path.observable_result: The developer can log into Console.

required_path.action: Accept initial terms if shown and select work domains and skill level.
required_path.observable_result: Console Home is populated with workspace tiles.

prerequisites.description: A SaaS account in Console is required; signup is linked from the getting-started guide.

external_gates.description: Administrator role assumptions in the Console guide may not match every fresh tenant invite path.

platform_outcomes.description: Console customizes visible workspaces from selected work domains.

excluded.item: Deploying a specific service after Home is reached
excluded.reason: Excluded until the selected first-success service is chosen.

sources.title: Get Started with Distributed Cloud Console

uncertainties.question: Is Console Home the first success, or must a named service quickstart be completed?
uncertainties.impact: Changes path length and required product interactions substantially.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Explicit first-success selection among Console Home and the quickstart index services.

uncertainties.question: What exact signup fields and tenant-provisioning waits appear for a fresh self-service account?
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account signup walkthrough through Console Home.
